use_cases: SaaS landing pages featuring animated 3D hero sections
Product showcases with glass-morphism navigation overlays
Company landing pages with scroll-triggered entrance animations
Portfolio sites showcasing interactive 3D visual elements
ai_summary: A full-screen hero section combining a Three.js 3D orb with glass-morphism navigation and Framer Motion staggered animations. Features scroll-based navigation state changes, mobile menu support, backdrop blur effects, and dark theme styling for a premium modern landing page experience.
